[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 0000111 3
6 0001100 2
7 0000010 1

01 10 1011110 5

23 32 0000100 1
34 43 0000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4

70 07 1111110 6
